programmes.show_description: Turn it up loud for 2 hours of proper rock from the 70s - the decade that gave birth to Prog and Metal! Including Pink Floyd, Led Zeppelin, Black Sabbath, Alice Cooper, AC/DC and Queen.
Over-bearded men & leftfield ladies - all with fabulous tunes! These are alternative hits from the west coast, the underground & the counter culture of the 1970s.
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
We didn't yet call them Power Ballads, but some masters of the genre - Boston, Toto & Whitesnake - were already at it! Simes has twenty-five power pop love songs and ballads - in order.
What was in the Top 10 during the Easter holiday in the 70s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 1970 to 1979, with ABBA, Blondie, 10cc, Slade, Kate Bush, Mud, Squeeze, and more!
Feelgood hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Tony's pulled out quite a list of pop pinups for two hours of indulgence. Bolan, Bowie, Cassidy, an Osmond, Abba girls, Rod, and ladies' men Barry White and Demis Roussos. Phwoar!
Our most complete list yet of UK number 1s of the decade! Some songs just don't have videos, but 146 chart toppers do, and here they are - in order!

programmes.show_name: Bruno Brookes UK Top 20 of the 70s
programmes.show_description: Including 10 million sellers back when it was still a rare achievement! These are the 20 biggest songs of the decade with Julie Covington, David Soul, Abba, Queen, Blondie and Wings.

programmes.show_name: Help Me Make It Through the Night!
programmes.show_description: Non-stop love songs, back to back all night, from the era of Leo Sayer, Carpenters, The Bee Gees & Minnie Ripperton.
From the era of glam rock, new wave and disco, it's all the hits from just one decade - the 1970s! Platform boots and flares at the ready?
Brothers, sisters, husbands and wives - we'll keep it in the family with 90 mins of top tunes from The Bee Gees, Abba, The Osmonds, The Nolans and others, all on the way!
From the era of Glam Rock, New Wave & Disco - it's all the party hits from just 1 decade - the 1970s! Platform boots & flares at the ready?
Whether you've kids or you were a kid in the 70s yourself, these are the 50 biggest singalong classics of the decade - in order!

These 25 stars of rock and pop during the '70s are no longer with us. But the music from names like McVie, Bowie, Bolan, Marley, Mercury, Lennon and Presley will live on forever.
From Joni Mitchell to Judie Tzuke, Al Green to Elton John - the 70s was a classic decade for singer-songwriters who have stood the test of time. Tony Blackburn chooses the tunes.
Through the 70s country music threw up regular UK chart smashes - from Anne Murray and Johnny Cash in 1970 to Dr Hook and Kenny Rogers at the end of the decade. And yes, there's Dolly!
Classic hits from just 1 year - 1970!
Mark Goodier with 1970's big music award winners. At the start of the decade which superstar singer won at the Oscars, and who got the keys to the City of Indiana?

60 minutes of back-to-back number 1s from 1979 - a year that began with YMCA and ended with Pink Floyd! With Mr Charts himself - Mark Goodier.
